newsArray.title: ENG vs AUS weather report: How will weather in London fare for the Women's T20 World Cup 2026 final?
newsArray.description: The Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 is all set to be played between England and Australia. The two sides will meet at the Lord’s Cricket Ground in London on July 5th; the teams will hope to put in their best performance and will be aiming to get their hands on the prestigious title.

newsArray.title: West Indies vs Sri Lanka Live Cricket Streaming Online in India, 2nd Test 2026, Day 3
newsArray.description: Catch Day 3 of the West Indies vs Sri Lanka 2nd Test 2026 live online in India and around the world. The ICC World Test Championship match from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium, Antigua, starts at 7:30 PM IST. Streaming is available on FanCode (India), TNT Sports/HBO Max (UK), Willow TV/Sling TV/Amazon Prime Video (USA/Canada), Fox Cricket/Kayo Sports.
